summary: Sprint 5+7 backend test: 70/71 pass. Dog care fields (feeding_schedule, medications, training_skills, vet info), run-sheet (sort + dog enrichment + client phone/emerg + date filter), homework full flow (admin create/delete, client list/complete with 403 cross-client, 422 title validation), dashboard roster dog enrichment all WORK. Regression 61/61 prior tests pass. CRITICAL BUG: POST /api/bookings drops dropoff_time/pickup_time because BookingIn model lacks those fields and create_booking never persists them.

critical.issue: BookingIn pydantic model (server.py lines 193-203) does NOT declare dropoff_time or pickup_time, and create_booking (lines 512-526) never writes them to the booking doc. The fields therefore default to '' in BookingOut, breaking the Sprint 5+7 promise that POST persists those values. Run-sheet secondary sort by dropoff_time is currently a no-op because every booking has dropoff_time=''. Frontend AdminBookingModal sending dropoff_time/pickup_time will silently lose data.

action_items: Add `dropoff_time: Optional[str] = ''` and `pickup_time: Optional[str] = ''` to BookingIn model in /app/backend/server.py (around line 203).
In create_booking() (around line 512), include `dropoff_time: body.dropoff_time or ''` and `pickup_time: body.pickup_time or ''` in the inserted document.

Consider also accepting these in PUT /api/bookings/{id}/reschedule or a dedicated PATCH for updating times after creation (not strictly required by review, but likely needed for AdminBookingModal edit flow).
critical_code_review_comments: BookingIn is missing dropoff_time / pickup_time despite BookingOut declaring them — typical input/output schema drift. Add defensive Pydantic Optional[str]='' fields.

create_booking() builds the booking doc field-by-field. Risk of additions to BookingIn not being persisted unless explicitly copied. Consider `doc = {**body.model_dump(), ...overrides}` to auto-include all input fields.

Run-sheet sort key uses `x.get('dropoff_time') or 'z'` — fine as a tie-breaker, but currently every booking has '' so the secondary sort never actually orders within a service group. Will start working once the input-model bug is fixed.
server.py is now ~1270 lines — consider splitting routes (bookings, dogs, homework, settings, waivers) into separate modules.
_resolve_client_scope is `async` but does no await — could be a sync helper.
test_credentials: admin@sithappens.com / admin123 — verified working. test_credentials.md present and valid.
seed_data_creation: Sprint 5+7 tests create TEST_S57_-prefixed clients/dogs/bookings/homework per module and clean them up via fixture teardown. Settings are temporarily set to require all 3 vaccines during this module and restored to single-vaccine legacy mode afterwards.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_sprint5_7.py -v. The only failing test is TestBookingTimes::test_booking_persists_dropoff_pickup — once BookingIn is patched and create_booking persists those fields, that single test should pass. All 61 prior tests (test_sithappens, test_sprint2/3/4) still pass — keep the existing conftest.py legacy-settings fixture untouched.
rca of the issue: Symptom: POST /api/bookings returns dropoff_time='' regardless of payload. Reproduction: POST {dog_id, date, service_type:'daycare', dropoff_time:'08:30', pickup_time:'17:00'} → response.dropoff_time = '' (admin creds, valid dog). Root cause: server.py:193-203 BookingIn Pydantic model lacks the two fields, so FastAPI strips them from the parsed body before create_booking() ever sees them. Even if they survived parsing, create_booking() builds `doc` with explicit keys only and never references body.dropoff_time/pickup_time. BookingOut DOES declare both fields with defaults '', so the response shape is valid but the values are silently dropped. Mitigation: add the two Optional[str]='' fields to BookingIn and copy them into the inserted document in create_booking (and ideally update_booking/reschedule if such an admin edit path is added).
